tasks.label: Bundle
tasks.command: cd drawdown_rust && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../out/rust_wasm && cd .. && rm -f out/rust_wasm/.gitignore && rm -rf out/dotnet_publish out/dotnet_wasm && dotnet publish drawdown_dotnet/DrawdownDotNet.csproj -c Release -o out/dotnet_publish && cp -R out/dotnet_publish/wwwroot out/dotnet_wasm && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.bundle.js monteCarloApp.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.worker.js monteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloWorker.js rustMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloShardWorker.js rustMonteCarloShardWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarloAnalysisWorker.js monteCarloAnalysisWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/dotNetMonteCarloWorker.js dotNetMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/dotNetMonteCarloShardWorker.js dotNetMonteCarloShardWorker.ts
